title: GauntletCI Configuration
description: Schema for .gauntletci.json — the optional GauntletCI configuration file placed at your repository root.

rules.description: Per-rule configuration overrides. Keys are rule IDs (e.g. 'GCI0001').

exitOn.description: Controls which severity level causes a non-zero exit code. Defaults to 'Block'.

policyReferences.description: Paths to external policy files to merge.

forbiddenImports.description: Per-layer forbidden import rules for GCI0035. Key: source namespace fragment. Value: list of forbidden target fragments.

corpus.description: Corpus pipeline configuration (local dev tool settings).

ollamaEndpoints.description: Ollama endpoints for silver labeling. Multiple entries enable round-robin load distribution.

url.description: Base URL of the Ollama server.

patternConsistency.description: Pattern consistency configuration for GCI0046 Pattern Consistency Deviation.

allowedSyncAsyncPairs.description: Method base names for which a sync+async pair is intentionally supported.

experimental.description: Experimental feature flags. Settings here may change or be removed without notice.

engineeringPolicy.description: Configuration for the experimental LLM-powered engineering policy evaluation step.

enabled.description: Enable the engineering policy evaluation step. Requires an LLM to be available.

path.description: Path to the engineering policy markdown file, relative to the repository root.

maxDiffChars.description: Maximum diff size in characters sent to the LLM.

RuleConfig.description: Configuration overrides for a single rule.

enabled.description: Whether the rule is enabled. Defaults to true.

severity.description: Override the rule's default severity. 'None' disables the rule. Overrides .editorconfig.

threshold.description: Optional numeric threshold for rules that support it (e.g. GCI0008 complexity threshold).

allowedPrereleasePrefixes.description: Prerelease suffixes that are permitted (e.g. ['-rc', '-beta']) for GCI0042.

LlmConfig.description: Premium CI/CD LLM configuration for remote enrichment.

ciApiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the API key.

licenseKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the GauntletCI license key.

modelPath.description: Path to the local ONNX model directory used by LocalLlmEngine. Defaults to ~/.gauntletci/models/phi4-mini.

numCtx.description: Ollama context window size in tokens (input + output combined).

maxCompleteTokens.description: Maximum tokens the model may generate per completion call.

embeddingOllamaUrl.description: Ollama base URL used for query embedding (analyze --with-expert-context).

model.description: Ollama model used for LLM enrichment and expert-context embedding.

enabled.description: Enable LLM enrichment by default. Equivalent to --with-llm on every run.

expertContext.description: Attach expert context from the local vector store by default. Equivalent to --with-expert-context.

prComments.description: Post findings as a GitHub PR review with inline comments. Equivalent to --github-pr-comments.

checks.description: Post findings as a GitHub Checks API check run. Equivalent to --github-checks.

annotations.description: Emit GitHub Actions workflow commands for inline annotations. Equivalent to --github-annotations.

coverage.description: Correlate findings with Codecov coverage data. Equivalent to --with-coverage.

slackWebhook.description: Slack Incoming Webhook URL. Posts Block findings to Slack. Equivalent to --notify-slack.

teamsWebhook.description: Microsoft Teams Incoming Webhook URL. Posts Block findings to Teams. Equivalent to --notify-teams.

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity to display. Equivalent to --severity. CLI flag overrides this.

sensitivity.description: Confidence-based noise filter. Equivalent to --sensitivity. CLI flag overrides this. strict: Block+High/Medium only. balanced (default): Block-all + Warn+High/Medium. permissive: all Block+Warn.

format.description: Output format. Equivalent to --output. CLI flag overrides this.

enabled.description: Enable ticket context enrichment by default. Equivalent to --with-ticket-context.
